name: Pumble
description: Team chat and collaboration platform with a REST API add-on for automating workspace actions (messages, channels, members, webhooks).

auth_methods.note: Pumble uses API keys sent in the X-Api-Key header to authenticate REST API requests; API keys are created in the workspace API section.

credential_access.note: The docs state the API add-on can be installed in a workspace and API keys generated via the workspace UI. The public pricing page does not indicate API access requires paid plan or sales/partnership approval.

api_surface.note: Documentation describes a REST API (Swagger UI at /api/docs) and lists ability to create messages, manage channels, members, webhooks and more; full endpoint docs exposed via Swagger on workspace.

buildability.note: Developer can install the API addon in a workspace and generate API keys via the UI (self-serve). No evidence that admin/partner approval or paid-only access is required, so building is feasible after routine key signup in a workspace.

queries: Pumble API documentation site:pumble.com OR "Pumble API" OR "Pumble developer" OR "Pumble integrations"
